note: Curve LlamaLend (OneWayLendingFactory) Controller — OLDER-gen impl (24 fns), 3 mainnet markets: CRV / WBTC / sUSDe collateral (all borrow crvUSD). 1 impl → 3 controllers via addresses[]. These lack approve(address,bool) and the +receiver overloads of the newer sreUSD/sfrxUSD impl (llamalend-controller-newgen). 8 cover (create_loan / add_collateral x2 / remove_collateral / borrow_more / repay x3) · 16 exclude (1 keeper save_rate, 6 callback-extended, 3 liquidate, 6 admin). The collateral DEPOSIT amount on borrow is a secondary effect (documented limitation, mirrors crvUSD).

0x23cfed03.reason: user create_loan on Curve LlamaLend Controller (lending) — venue=llama_lend{controller,collateral}; create_loan/borrow_more → Borrow (debt=crvUSD), add/remove_collateral → Supply/Withdraw (asset=collateral), repay → Repay. on_behalf_of = _for arg if present else tx.from.
